title: hypericum maculatum var. immaculatum
intro: Hypericum maculatum var. immaculatum, also known as Spotted St. John's Wort, is a perennial herbaceous plant in the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce anxiety and depression, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Hypericum maculatum var. immaculatum include tinctures, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
